active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.

verification_commands.command: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 uv run pytest -p no:cacheprovider tests/test_agent_kernel.py tests/test_public_benchmarks.py::test_public_benchmark_kernel_trace_remains_default_off tests/test_public_benchmarks.py::test_public_benchmark_runs_kernel_step_when_v3_kernel_enabled -q
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 uv run ruff check src/memoryos_lite/agent_kernel.py src/memoryos_lite/v3_contracts.py tests/test_agent_kernel.py tests/test_public_benchmarks.py

longmemeval.pass_fail: not_applicable: no default LongMemEval retrieval, answer, judge, or scoring path changed; no benchmark-quality movement claimed

locomo.pass_fail: not_applicable: no default LoCoMo retrieval, answer, judge, or scoring path changed; no benchmark-quality movement claimed

review_eval_decision.reason: Phase 14 changed only the opt-in MEMORYOS_AGENT_KERNEL=v1 kernel memory-action verification path. Focused kernel and public trace smoke tests exercise the real MemoryOS v3/public path. Default LongMemEval/LoCoMo retrieval, answer projection, judge behavior, and scoring did not change, so milestone public eval is not applicable and no benchmark-quality movement is claimed.

longmemeval.reason: No default LongMemEval retrieval, answer, judge, or scoring path changed; phase evidence is focused opt-in kernel trace verification.

locomo.reason: No default LoCoMo retrieval, answer, judge, or scoring path changed; focused synthetic public-kernel smoke was rerun through pytest.
